label: ARCHITECTURE
query_text: photo showcasing architectural exteriors such as landmark buildings city skylines monuments or modern facades

label: CARD
query_text: close up photo of bank cards or id cards

label: DRAWING
query_text: an illustration, a manga style drawing or a hand drawing without printed text

label: ELECTRONICS
query_text: photo focusing on modern electronic devices such as phones tablets laptops or gaming consoles

label: FOOD
query_text: photos of delicious food desserts or drinks

label: GROUP
query_text: a group photo of several friends taking a selfie together

label: NATURE
query_text: a natural landscape photo showing mountains rivers or forests under bright daylight

label: PETS
query_text: cute pet portrait featuring cats dogs or other domestic animals

label: PLANTS
query_text: close up photo focusing on vibrant plants flowers or leaves

label: QRCODE
query_text: image showing a large qr code or barcode on paper or a phone screen

label: SELFIE
query_text: a close up selfie portrait of one person facing the camera with no printed text overlay

label: TEXT
query_text: a text photo or a messaging screenshot mostly filled with text or forms

label: VEHICLES
query_text: photo highlighting modern transportation vehicles such as cars trains airplanes or bikes
